title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 16 curation dispositioned
body: Closed claim 610b98fb after processing legacy backlog batch 16 in place. Dispositions: 4 duplicate, 1 owner-gated. Owner-gated register now carries 38 items. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, collaboration-state check ok, strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 24 healthy, 7 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
